business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number CP-BIP-2025-4420, effective 09/01/2025. Submitted to Maine Employers Mutual. Prior carriers: Hartford Financial Services (2023, $419,914.35), Chubb Limited (2022, $456,514.10). Zero claims across all three prior policy years. No cancellations.

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
No policy cancellations in any prior year
22 years under current management indicating operational stability
31 years in business with $48M annual revenue
concerns: Portfolio not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
LOC-007 (3250 Hill Avenue, Toledo, OH — 1998 Manufacturing) is the sole unsprinklered location
LOC-004 (2100 Kuntz Road, Dayton — Manufacturing, built 1992) is the oldest facility in the portfolio
No written contracts with all subcontractors
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) not maintained
Plumbing last updated in 2015 — oldest of the three major systems
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted, introducing variable occupancy hazards
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: No claims reported for 2022 (Chubb Limited, $456,514.10 premium), 2023 (Hartford Financial Services, $419,914.35 premium), or 2024 (Liberty Mutual Insurance, $392,002.31 premium). No cancellations in any prior year. Three-year premium trend shows decline from $456,514 to $392,002.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Portfolio consists of 9 locations: 6 warehouses, 2 manufacturing facilities, and 1 office. Total square footage spans from 8,500 sq ft (office) to 425,000 sq ft (warehouse). Properties built between 1992 and 2019. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM. 95 full-time and 18 part-time employees. Annual revenue $48,000,000.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: No. Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained: No. Lockout/tagout procedures in place: No. Last system updates: Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: No claims reported in 2022 (Chubb Limited, premium $456,514.10), 2023 (Hartford Financial Services, premium $419,914.35), or 2024 (Liberty Mutual Insurance, premium $392,002.31). No policy cancellations in any of the three prior years reviewed.
